details.test: Task 1: Medium roast whole bean subscription under $150
Task 2: Three coffee varieties, 2 each, added to cart
Task 3: Choose product with longer warranty (analogy for espresso machine)
Task 4: Eco-friendly products (analogy for cups & lids) under $60
Task 5: One-time order with 3 coffees under $80 total
Task 6: Checkout with standard shipping and next Monday delivery
Task 7: Register new business account with single newsletter preference
Task 8: Top-rated fair-trade dark roast whole bean with free delivery (4 units)
Task 9: Cart over $100 with 10% promo applied and proceed to checkout
